expert_rss.summary: Iranian leaders interpret U.S. President Donald Trump’s agreement to a two-week ceasefire as an admission that U.S. and Israeli application of overwhelming airpower achieved military, but not strategic, gains. expert_rss.summary: Executive Summary: In mid-March, nine central ministries jointly released a new plan for the country’s Internet of Things (IoT) industry over the next three years (Ministry of Industry and Information Technology [MIIT], March 31). expert_rss.title: This Week in DOW: Iran Ceasefire, Daring Rescue, Honoring Gold Star Spouses
expert_rss.summary: This week, the U.S. announced a two-week ceasefire with Iran, as Secretary of War Pete Hegseth hailed the success of Operation Epic Fury in dismantling one of the world's largest militaries, and the War Department observed Gold Star Spouses Day.

expert_rss.title: Army Launches Data Operations Center, Giving Warfighters Decisive Edge
expert_rss.summary: The Army launched the Army Data Operations Center — a key initiative designed to transform how it manages and uses its vast data resources to ensure decision dominance on the modern battlefield.

expert_rss.title: White House Honors National Guard-Supported Counterdrug Operations
expert_rss.summary: The White House Office of National Drug Control Policy recognized personnel assigned to National Guard counterdrug programs for their support to 10 award-winning law enforcement investigations.

expert_rss.title: Navy Researchers Seek Volunteers for NASA Study
expert_rss.summary: Navy researchers at Wright-Patterson Air Force Base, Ohio, are seeking volunteers to assist in a study that directly supports one of the United States' biggest space exploration goals: returning American astronauts to the moon.

expert_rss.title: The only Navy Seabee awarded the nation’s highest award for valor
expert_rss.summary: The early, brutal battle to protect a Special Forces camp near Dong Xoai changed the course of the Vietnam War. Marvin Shields gave his all in its defense.

expert_rss.summary: Trump's Iran war has diverted diplomats and drained interceptor stockpiles — just as his envoys were supposed to deliver security guarantees to Kyiv.

expert_rss.summary: The Army Data Operations Center’s debut is part of an enormous push to further integrate data and machine learning into military operations.

expert_rss.summary: The agreement came after the FAA conducted testing in New Mexico on the laser system used by the Pentagon and Homeland Security Department.

expert_rss.summary: The department’s adoption of the Oracle Health’s FEHR was halted in 2023 following a year-long pause over safety and functionality concerns.

expert_rss.summary: Despite its nearly century of resonance with readers, “All Quiet on the Western Front” has only been translated twice — until now.

wikipedia.notes: Three suspected suicide bombings were carried out at three locations in Maiduguri, Borno State, Nigeria. The bombings occurred during a yearslong peaceful stretch in the city.
Several perpetrators opened fire near the Israeli consulate building, Turkish police neutralized the attackers.
